allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
settings, reviews, moodboard messages, edit profile

- Settings screen: every option opens a real sub-screen \(edit name/email/phone, change password, notification toggles, bank account, payout schedule, earnings history, privacy, location, visibility, FAQ, terms, policy, logout dialog\)
- Sign in: forgot password → reset email sent confirmation flow
- Onboarding: added Create Account step \(email/password/confirm\) as step 0 for both client and nail tech flows
- Discover: removed hamburger drawer, topbar now has bell + gear icons; removed superlike button, ✕ and ❤️ enlarged
- Moodboard: "Share with my tech" opens match-selection modal with checkboxes; per-match sharedMoodboards map in App.jsx
- NT dashboard: earnings card tappable, bell/gear header, moodboard tab, calendar client names tappable
- Various: notifications screen, sign in screen, NT moodboard tab, story card vibe tags

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
earnings fix, match chat, tech moodboard sharing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "chat layout fix, vibe sharing")
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "calendar navigation, chat fixes")
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "pre-moodboard and messaging fixes save")

Bash(git add src/MessagesContext.js src/App.jsx src/App.css src/screens/ChatScreen.jsx src/screens/NailTechMessages.jsx src/screens/MoodboardScreen.jsx src/screens/NailTechMoodboard.jsx src/screens/ProfileScreen.jsx src/screens/BookingScreen.jsx src/screens/NailTechOnboarding.jsx && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
8 features: moodboard photo upload, add vibe/style, per-board vibes, messages context, reviews section, multi-service booking, NT photo upload signup, moodboard message persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "moodboard uploads, messaging fixes, multi-service booking")
